description: Per-carve-out activation log. G8 STRUCTURAL: autoRevokeAtUtc REQUIRED (≤ emergencyDeclaration.autoLiftAtUtc); gateCarved cited from specific actor.gate-id format; Council Lv6+ ≥4/7 attestation required for activation. Auto-revoke on emergency-lifting; carve-outs do NOT carry over to normal operations.

emergencyDeclarationCid.description: Active emergencyDeclarationAttestation CID (must be active state when activated)

gateCategoryDescription.description: Human-readable description of what is being carved out and why

carveOutJustificationCid.description: Detailed justification document CID (may be encrypted if operational details sensitive)

councilAttestations.description: G8 STRUCTURAL: Council Lv6+ ≥4/7 required for carve-out activation

autoRevokeAtUtc.description: G8 STRUCTURAL: MUST be ≤ active emergencyDeclaration.autoLiftAtUtc; auto-revoke on emergency-lifting

actualRevokedAtUtc.description: Actual revoke timestamp (≤ autoRevokeAtUtc); MUST be set on emergency-lifting

postEmergencyAuditCid.description: Reference to silenKazaoriReview entry that audits this carve-out's use + outcome
